---
title: "Download and Processing Flow"
author: "Ryan Santos"
date: "2026-06-20"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Download and Processing Flow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

## Flow

The package follows a simple reproducible flow:

1. Download raw data from Power BI.
2. Filter and verify the intended scope.
3. Process column names and types.
4. Validate coverage, units, dates, and identifiers.
5. Save snapshots or audit reports when needed.

```r
pm25 <- vigiar_baixar_rj("df_anual", validar_cobertura = TRUE) |>
  process_pm25(tipo = "anual")

diag <- vigiar_diagnosticar_serie(pm25, escopo = "rj")
vigiar_relatorio_diagnostico(diag)
```

## Raw Download

```r
vigiar_conectar()

raw <- vigiar_baixar("df_anual", uf = NULL)
names(raw)
```

Raw Power BI columns can include names such as `muni`, `UF`, `ano`,
`Media_pm25`, and `Categoria_pm25`.

## RJ-Specific Download

```r
pm25_rj <- vigiar_baixar_rj("df_anual", validar_cobertura = TRUE)

attr(pm25_rj, "vigiar_rj_n_municipios")
attr(pm25_rj, "vigiar_rj_n_esperado")
attr(pm25_rj, "vigiar_rj_cobertura_pct")
```

This step uses the internal 92-municipality registry. It does not rely on a
numeric code interval alone.

## Processing

```r
pm25 <- process_pm25(pm25_rj, tipo = "anual")
names(pm25)
```

Common mappings are:

| Raw Power BI name | Standard vigiar name | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `muni`, `ID_MUNI` | `cod_municipio` | 6-digit IBGE municipality code |
| `UF`, `UF_SIGLA` | `sigla_uf` | Brazilian state abbreviation |
| `Media_pm25` | `pm25_media_anual` | Annual PM2.5 mean |
| `pm25` | `pm25_media` | Monthly PM2.5 mean |
| `n_dias` | `n_dias_criticos` | Days above reference |
| `LAT`, `LON` | `latitude`, `longitude` | Coordinates |
| `Indicador` | `indicador` | Health indicator |
| `est` | `estimativa` | Point estimate |
| `low`, `high` | `ic_inferior`, `ic_superior` | 95 percent interval |
| `pop` | `populacao` | Population |
| `Code` | `cod_uf` | State code |
| `Ano` | `ano` | Year |

## Snapshots

```r
snap <- vigiar_snapshot(dados = pm25, tabela = "df_anual")
vigiar_verificar_snapshot(snap)
vigiar_salvar_snapshot(snap, "pm25-rj-snapshot.rds")
```

Snapshots preserve data attributes, including RJ coverage metadata.
